body_markdown:
# PitchLab Weekly Digest · 2026-06-16

Week ending 2026-06-16: sample-out CLV -6.77% (-9.27% vs prior run). Research only — not betting advice.

## Executive summary

- No league shows out-of-sample +CLV vs sharp closing odds — confirms the honest no-edge conclusion. Product value is the transparent tool, not betting alpha.

## Walk-forward backtest

- Avg CLV: -6.77% (Δ -9.27% vs prior pipeline run)
- ROI (flat): -12.41%
- Brier: 0.5782
- Bets: 903

## League CLV

- **E0**: CLV -8.76% · Brier 0.5902
- **D1**: CLV -6.90% · Brier 0.5991
- **SP1**: CLV -7.74% · Brier 0.5898
- **I1**: CLV -6.26% · Brier 0.5948
- **F1**: CLV -6.57% · Brier 0.6037
- **E1**: CLV -7.27% · Brier 0.629

_Best (least negative): I1_ · _Weakest: E0_

## Champion / challenger

- Champion: walk-forward CLV (Phase 0 truth machine)
- Challenger: Dixon-Coles (no calibration)
- Note: Auto-promote ENABLED — gates passed.
